properties.Test Case: Test Page reordering behavior to ensure that interior pages can be reordered, but reordering xmatter is not allowed.
properties.Steps: - Test Page reordering behavior to ensure that interior pages can be reordered, but reordering xmatter is not allowed.

properties.Test Case: Page context menu: duplicate page. Try after page creation, reordering. Try reordering after duplication.
properties.Steps: - Page context menu: duplicate page. Try after page creation, reordering. Try reordering after duplication.

properties.Test Case: Page context menu: Change Layout from various to various, showing expected preservation & loss of data. [Known issue: if you apply change layout to entire book, thumbnails are not updated.)
properties.Steps: Page context menu: Change Layout from various to various, showing expected preservation & loss of data. [Known issue: if you apply change layout to entire book, thumbnails are not updated.)

properties.Test Case: Change zoom level; Check that it functions correctly. Change zoom several iterations.
properties.Steps: - Change zoom level; Check that it functions correctly. Change zoom several iterations.

properties.Test Case: Check format gear behavior, esp. for text boxes that are at bottom of page or nearly zoomed off screen. Make sure Format dialogue is draggable.
properties.Steps: - Check format gear behavior, esp. for text boxes that are at bottom of page or nearly zoomed off screen. Make sure Format dialogue is draggable.
